localizations.title: The Dragon's Seven Tests
localizations.hiddenObject_2: Look closely at the bottom of the high wall.
localizations.hint_1_first: Count the nails. All the nails…
localizations.hint_1: Count all the nails, including the ones hidden by the texts and the one used to nail the note.
localizations.hint_5: Never mind how many fish there are. What matters is their positioning.
localizations.hint_6: He will not let you pass. So, you must find another way to enter. Look closely at the bottom of the high wall.
localizations.hint_8: On their own, these bamboos are of no use whatsoever. Go talk to the peddler.
localizations.hint_12: To cross the lake, you will need a bamboo raft.
localizations.hint_15_first: This gard is waiting for a password. To obtain it, you must first find a scroll.
localizations.hint_15: Look closely at the temple pillars and find the animals on the fortune cookie. You must link the dots so identified with the tips of the chopsticks to obtain the password.
localizations.hint_20_first: This scroll will be useful to access the throne room. Observe the ideograms that match each animal.
localizations.hint_20: The pillars of the nearby temple share symbols with this scroll. Spot them! But how do you go about linking them?
localizations.hint_21_first: This fan must be correctly assembled and then, you must fan yourself to discover which direction to take.
localizations.hint_21: As indicated above the central panel, only take the bottom left quart of the symbols.
localizations.hint_22_first: These symbols are incomprehensible… To decipher them and to find the path, only one specific portion must be read.
localizations.hint_22: As indicated above the central panel, do take only the bottom left quart of the symbols.
localizations.hint_23: Never mind the number of butterflies. You'd better look at their positioning.
localizations.hint_24: Use the hands positioning in machine 60.
localizations.hint_26_first: The Yi King rules your life and that of the peddler as well. Read the 6 steps of his journey.
localizations.hint_26: Take an interest in the meaning of the account: For example, the Great Wall evokes a long line.
localizations.hint_28: It's impossible to count all the flowers. You'd better look at the shape of the branch.
localizations.hint_30: You will have no use for fortune in your quest. Manifest generosity.
localizations.hint_31_first: The Yi King rules your life. Prick up your ears, hasn't the melody changed?
localizations.hint_31: The melody rhythm is: Long/long/double/long, then…
localizations.hint_35_first: Does the only visible symbol remind you of something? The Mahjong tiles, when correctly oriented, will show you the path you must follow.
localizations.hint_35: Progress in ascending order of bamboos, starting from 1.
localizations.hint_40: On its own, the rope will be of no use. Go talk to the beggar.
localizations.hint_42: Did you take cards 1 and Y?
localizations.hint_45_first: This fan must be correctly assembled and then, you must fan yourself to discover which direction to take.
localizations.hint_45: You observe the back of the cards while fanning yourself. A wind rose is visible. What does the "?" indicate?
localizations.hint_48: Now, you can cross the lake.
localizations.hint_51: With no additional indications, these tiles will remain mysterious.
localizations.hint_59: Did you take cards 91, 92, 93? Put the dragon together following the model and take the indicated card.
localizations.hint_60: Use cards 24 and 63 to form the requested shadow puppetry in machine 60.
localizations.hint_63: Use the hands positioning in machine 60.
localizations.hint_65_first: The begger is in fact pointing one Mahjong tile out… At the intersection ("the crossroad") of the 4 tiles is the one you are looking for.
localizations.hint_65: Count the number of flowers on the tile pointed out by the beggar.
localizations.hint_66: The Yi King rules your life. At the bottom of the stairs, there is a Yi King symbol. And the card describes 6 identical doors…
localizations.hint_68: The Yi King rules your life. Observe the lanterns, from top to bottom…
localizations.hint_74_first: This fan must be correctly assembled and then, you must fan yourself to discover which direction to take.
localizations.hint_74: You observe the back of the cards while fanning yourself. A wind rose is visible. What does the "?" indicate?
localizations.hint_75: The symbols on the pillars show two elements of a scroll that you will need to access the throne room.
localizations.hint_76: The Yi King rules your life. Observe these 6 scrolls.
localizations.hint_87: When properly positioned, these chopsticks will be useful once you entered the Forbidden City.
localizations.hint_88: Look closely at the garden decorations. The number of items is less important than the shape they form.
localizations.hint_91: Put the dragon together following the model and take the indicated card.
localizations.hint_92: Put the dragon together following the model and take the indicated card.
localizations.hint_93: Put the dragon together following the model and take the indicated card.
localizations.hint_95: It may happen that a disciple makes an error but it is his duty to try.
localizations.hint_99_first: The Yi King rules your life. The Empress refers to the 6 times, sequentially, where you used it today.
localizations.hint_99: The direction (landscape/portrait) of the 6 cards will give you a final Yi King.
localizations.hint_100: The Yi King rules your life. Look closely at the traditional gate located on the other side.
localizations.answer_hint_1: There are 27 nails on this door: 26 around the door (including the ones hidden by the messages, and the 1 used to nail the top of the note.
localizations.answer_hint_5: There are 5 fish but they form a 6. So, you have to enter 6 fish in the slab (machine 88).
localizations.answer_hint_8: With the rope (40) given by the peddler and the bamboos (8), make a raft.
localizations.answer_hint_15: The symbols on the pillars are those of the Tiger and the Rooster. Place the chopsticks on the fortune cookie so to point at the 2 symbols. The opposite tips of the chopsticks point to the password. Say "Eternal Glory" in the mic.
localizations.answer_hint_21: The question mark shows that you must go to the East (E).
localizations.answer_hint_22: If you take a quart of each symbol, you read the addition: 24+47.
localizations.answer_hint_23: There are 8 butterflies forming a 3. So, you must enter 3 butterflies in the slab (machine 88).
localizations.answer_hint_26: Each of the 6 sequential steps matches a line of the Yi King: Great Wall (long), broken bridge (double), long road (long), second road (long), broken rod (double), disrupting lake (double).
localizations.answer_hint_27: There are three visible numbers on the teapot.
localizations.answer_hint_28: The shape of the branch forms an 8. Enter 8 flowers in the slab (machine 88).
localizations.answer_hint_30: Offer this gold coin (30) to the beggar (65).
localizations.answer_hint_35: In the order and from the bottom, press the left, middle, right, middle, left, right spaces.
localizations.answer_hint_40: With the bamboos pointed at by the begger (8) and this rope (40), make a raft.
localizations.answer_hint_45: The question mark shows that you must go to the East (E).
localizations.answer_hint_48: Use this raft (48) to cross the lake (12).
localizations.answer_hint_51: The tiles of the peddler and of the sea (boat), and those of the princess (sedan chair), and the peacock draw two lines that meet on the 8-flower tile.
localizations.answer_hint_59: The dragon's head indicates number 8 and the tail number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_65: On the Mahjong, the tiles of the peddler and of the sea (boat), and those of the princess (sedan chair), and the peacock draw two lines that meet on the 8-flower tile.
localizations.answer_hint_66: The door has a Yi King double underlining. There are 6 identical of them. Enter double/double/double/double/double/double in the app.
localizations.answer_hint_68: The small lanterns next to each other stand for a double line, the large lanters a long line. The Yi King is therefore double/long/long/double/long/long.
localizations.answer_hint_74: The question mark shows that you must go to the East (E).
localizations.answer_hint_76: Each scroll stands for a long line except the one with a brushstroke in the middle. The Yi King is therefore long/long/double/long/long/long.
localizations.answer_hint_88: If you look closely at the shapes in the garden, you will find: 3 for the butterflies, 8 for the flowers, and 6 for the fish.
localizations.answer_hint_91: The dragon's head indicates number 8 and the tail number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_92: The dragon's head indicates number 8 and the tail number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_93: The dragon's head indicates number 8 and the tail number 7.
localizations.answer_hint_99: The portrait cards represent a double line, those in landscape format a long line. The Yi King is long/double/double/long/long/long.
localizations.answer_hint_100: Did you take card 51? On the left gate the following Yi Kin is hiding: long/long/long/double/long/long. Dial it in the app using the allocated button.
localizations.machine_15: Eternal Glory: correct! You can pass…
localizations.machine_35: A secret passage opens in the high wall. You enter the capital right under the gards nose.
localizations.machine_60: You have triumphed over the shadow test.
localizations.machine_88: The slab pivots and reveals a secret passage that sinks in the ground…
localizations.machine_98: Great service! You have a bright future in this profession! Take a break, we start over again in an hour. You dash off. You entere the Forbidden City.
localizations.event_1: You can flip the introduction card over.
localizations.event_2: Thus the noble man tells the difference between the top and the bottom and thereby strengthens people's mind. You have found your way, but soon the way splits in two.
localizations.event_3: Distance and separation, such is the lot of the traveler. Thank you for your wisdom, accept this modest gift.
localizations.event_4: It is beneficial to have a place to go to and to see the great man. The wave has shown you the way. Find the Empress in the capital...
localizations.event_5: Happy trade with others. You seem lost strangers... The Empress? She reigns in the Forbidden City. but no one enters there easily.
localizations.event_6: Magnificient success through perseverance and peace. You sneak into the Forbidden City but the guards are everywhere. Maybe through the kitchens?
localizations.event_7: "Clouds are gathering, but still no rain." One of the scrolls catches your attention.
localizations.event_8: It is advantageous to undertake, to travel, to take responsibilities. You are wise and remember the teachings. Take this reward...
localizations.YiKing_NotNow: It is not the right time for this Yi King. Make sure you performed them in the right order.
localizations.machine_60_step1_answer: Shadow puppetry: Form the bird's 2 wings: L2 and R3.
localizations.machine_60_step2_answer: Shadow puppetry: Form the shell of the snail: L1 and R4.
localizations.machine_60_step3_answer: Shadow puppetry: Form the deer's antlers: L4 and R5.
localizations.machine_60_step4_answer: Shadow puppetry: Form the elephant's  head and trunk: L6 and R1.
localizations.machine_98_introduction:
Important

Carefully read the instructions of card 80 before pressing "GO".
localizations.machine_98_right: Congrats! Pass the app and cards 84, 85, and 86 from hand to hand, then press "GO".
localizations.machine_98_wrong: This is not the right recipe. Get ready for the next dish, press "GO".
localizations.machine_98_0-2: You are walking disasters! Get out of my kitchen! Ashamed of yourself, you dash off, but you have entered the Forbidden City.
localizations.machine_98_3-4: Ok, take a break! And try to do less damage to the next service! You are spinning. You have entered the Forbidden City.
localizations.machine_98_5-6: "Great service! You have a bright future in this profession! Take a break, we start over again in an hour." You dash off. You enter the Forbidden City.
localizations.machine_95_result1: Perseverance was your main virtue today. It's time to show me your other qualities. Welcome to the Temple of the Gold Dragon.
localizations.machine_95_result2: A man who thinks he has found wisdom is a fool. That was your first lesson. It was not the right answer, you still have a lot to learn…
localizations.machine_95_result3: Is stating to be humble a mark of humility? You will have to show more of it.
localizations.machine_95_result4: You say that you are courageous? You will have to demonstrate more during your learning process. That was not the correct answer. You still have much to learn…
localizations.machine_95_title: What is the quality that convinced me of taking you as a disciple?
